---
title: "Project Underworld"
subtitle: "Командный гайд по коду · подготовка к защите GRK"
author:
  - name: "Mykyta Kyslytsia"
    affiliations:
      - name: "UAM Poznań · GRK 2026 · metody A07 + B07"
  - name: "Aliaksandra Mantulenka"
  - name: "Artem Isianov"
date: today
date-format: "DD.MM.YYYY"
lang: ru
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-title: "Содержание"
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 10pt
    mainfont: "Segoe UI"
    monofont: "Consolas"
    linestretch: 1.3
    margin:
      x: 2cm
      y: 2cm
---

{{< include TEAM_GUIDE.md >}}
